name: X-Saber Pellina
desc:
If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can send it to the GY; Special Summon 2 "X-Saber" monsters from your Deck, except "X-Saber Pellina", but destroy them during the End Phase. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material for an "X-Saber" monster: You can apply 1 of these effects.
● That monster can make a second attack during each Battle Phase.
● That monster can attack directly.
You can only use each effect of "X-Saber Pellina" once per turn.
